nodes.name: 坦桑尼亚
nodes.summary: 坦桑尼亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联307种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Eastern crested guinea fowl、Shelley's francolin等307种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Tanzanian red-billed hornbill
nodes.summary: Tanzanian red-billed hornbill（Tanzanian red-billed hornbill，学名 Tockus ruahae），主要分布于坦桑尼亚。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in central Tanzania and was discovered by Robert Glen and Sue Stolberger in Ruaha National Park All five red-billed hornbills were formerly considered conspecific
